title: erycibe paniculata
intro: Erycibe paniculata is a plant species in the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the "longan tree" or "garden strawberry tree". It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, Erycibe paniculata is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
